name: io.github.ranklancer/uptime-kuma-mcp
title: Uptime Kuma MCP Server
description: MCP server for Uptime Kuma — monitor uptime, manage monitors, heartbeats, notifications, and status pages

environmentVariables.name: KUMA_INSTANCES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of instance names (e.g. 'kuma' or 'primary,secondary')

environmentVariables.name: KUMA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Uptime Kuma instance (e.g. 'http://192.0.2.1:3001')
